cases.input: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center center no-repeat, url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center center no-repeat

cases.test: should normalize background position with var and multiple background
cases.input: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center center no-repeat, url("/media/examples/lizard.png") var(--foo)

cases.test: should normalize background position with var and multiple background #1
cases.input: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") var(--foo), url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center center no-repeat

cases.test: should normalize background position with var and multiple background #2
cases.input: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center center no-repeat, url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center var(--foo)
cases.expected: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") 50% no-repeat, url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center var(--foo)

cases.test: should normalize background position with var and multiple background #3
cases.input: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center var(--foo), url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center center no-repeat
cases.expected: background: url("/media/examples/lizard.png") center var(--foo), url("/media/examples/lizard.png") 50% no-repeat
